description: Budget tracker evolution focused on rollover semantics, balance preservation, and monthly boundaries.

contracts.description: add_expense(category, amount) must remain callable with two required positional arguments after self.
contracts.rationale: New reporting features do not require API breakage.

contracts.description: Unused monthly budget rolls into the next month; overspending does not create hidden credit.
contracts.rationale: Reporting and alert features should not change accounting semantics.

contracts.description: Available balance reported to the user must not become positive due to accounting sign errors after overspend.
contracts.rationale: Feature additions should preserve the sign convention of balances.
